description: This Java source file defines the OfficerController class, which exposes REST API endpoints for officer-related operations such as viewing the queue, application details, overriding decisions, and querying audit logs within a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: OfficerController
classes.description: RestController managing officer-related API endpoints for queue management, application details, decision overrides, and audit log queries.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Fetches list of applications pending review with optional status and decision filters.

methods.name: applicationDetail
methods.description: Retrieves full details of a specific application draft by UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Overrides an application's decision and logs the action as an audit event.

methods.name: auditLog
methods.description: Queries audit events filtered by optional time range, event type, and user ID, with pagination.

methods.name: toAuditResponse
methods.description: Transforms an AuditEvent into API response DTO.

methods.name: parseInstantOrNull
methods.description: Parses a string into an Instant object, returning null if input is null or blank.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts a UUID user ID from the Authentication object.
